entity: 1979-80 NBA Finals: Los Angeles Lakers def. Philadelphia 76ers 4-2 (Magic Johnson's rookie Finals MVP, subbing for the injured Kareem in Game 6)
notes: Indexed from the LAL side (1610612747). LAL had a first-round bye in 1979-80 (1-seed in the West), so they only played 3 playoff series and round_number=3 is the NBA Finals (vs PHI). LAL also beat PHI in the 1981-82 Finals (4-2) and 2000-01 Finals (4-1) — those are separate fixtures, and the season_id discriminator narrows to the Magic-rookie 1980 series.
